events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: **fail**, high risk — an aluminum conductor landed on a device not marked CO/ALR is a direct listing/code violation (NEC 110.14(A)), not a tolerance judgment call, due to the known fire hazard from aluminum-to-non-rated-device terminations (oxidation, thermal creep, loosening, arcing). Corrective action is to swap in a CO/ALR-rated device or transition via a listed AL-CU connector before the rough-in can pass inspection.
